milestones.label: Foundation
milestones.focus: Verified private platform, application, purchasing, Android, cookbook, backup, and repository baseline.

milestones.label: M0 · Runtime
milestones.focus: Complete the observation window and remaining recovery approvals after authenticated device checks passed.

milestones.label: M1 · Acceptance
milestones.focus: Complete real production, receiving, offline-count, device, and interface-retirement acceptance gates.

milestones.label: M2 · Releases
milestones.focus: Isolate tests, add private CI, formalize signed releases, and improve owner-facing observability.

milestones.label: M3 · Operations
milestones.focus: Harden production, point of sale, inventory, purchasing, and reconciliation from pilot evidence.

milestones.label: M4 · Cookbook
milestones.focus: Govern editorial data, review all 115 entries, complete printer preflight, and approve a physical proof.

milestones.label: M5 · Offline
milestones.focus: Add sync diagnostics, prove populated cache upgrades, and choose further offline work from evidence.

milestones.label: M6 · Lifecycle
milestones.focus: Decide desktop packaging support and formalize the platform and storage lifecycle.
